topic: The snack aisle at my grocery store has been moving one section closer to the entrance every week
title: The Snack Aisle at My Grocery Store Has Been Moving One Section Closer to the Entrance | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My grocery store's snack aisle moves one section closer to the entrance every week.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a grocery store snack aisle with chips and crackers on shelves, fluorescent overhead light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Local Safeway. Same store fourteen years. I always know where everything is.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of a Safeway grocery store at dusk, the storefront sign glowing red, no shoppers visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Aisle twelve. Cereal. Aisle six. Snacks.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of an aisle number sign hanging from a grocery store ceiling reading AISLE 12, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Wednesday in October. Snacks were in aisle five.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a grocery store aisle with a sign reading AISLE 5 and rows of snack packaging visible, fluorescent overhead light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a shopping cart with a hand on the handle, only the hand visible, dim grocery store light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Next Wednesday. Aisle four. Same chips. Same brands. Same shelving fixture.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a grocery store shelf with chips and snacks arranged identically to a previous week, fluorescent light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Asked the manager. He said the layout has not changed in years.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a grocery store manager in uniform seen from behind at a customer service counter, no face visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He showed me the floor plan. Aisle six. Snacks. As always.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a paper grocery store floor plan with aisle labels visible, a finger pointing at AISLE 6, only the finger visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But each week the snack aisle is one closer to the front. I have been counting.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a notepad with handwritten weekly observations of aisle numbers, a pen across the page, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This week the snacks are in the produce section. Beside the bananas.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a grocery store produce section with bananas on a display, bags of chips and snack packaging stacked beside them, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Only I see them there. Every other customer sees produce.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a grocery store produce section with shoppers walking through, no chips visible from a normal angle, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Next week the snacks will reach the entrance. I will not be there.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of grocery store sliding entrance doors from inside, automatic doors open on an empty parking lot at dusk, vertical 9:16 framing
